titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NLS Adv. MS 15.1.18, no. 65

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=136 status=live modified=2017-01-30 19:28:03.085245+00 | translation moa=137 status=live modified=2016-10-21 01:08:26.656265+00

p.cl:
Omnibus Christi fidelibus presens Scriptum visuris vel audituris Marioria Cumin . Comitissa de Buchan eternam in domino
Salutem .

me concessisse ⁊ hac carta mea confirmasse deo ⁊ ecclesie sancti Andree
Apostoli in Scocia ⁊ canonicis ibidem deo seruientibus ⁊ Seruituris ecclesiam De Kennauchyn cum decimis ⁊
oblacionibus ⁊ terris ⁊ cum omnibus eidem ecclesie iuste pertinentibus Sicut carta Merleswayn filii Colbani ⁊
confirmaciones heredum suorum testantur
Et in huius rei testimonium presens Scriptum Sigillo meo roboraui

Hiis testibus
Domino Germano priore ⁊ conuentu De Rustinoth . Rann’ De Bonekill’ . Roberto de Mohauth . Michaele de Moha
uth . Philippo de feodarg . Helia Capellano . Adam de Teket ⁊ Adam de Rule Clericis ⁊ aliis .
To all Christ’s faithful who shall view or hear the present written deed, Marjory Comyn, Countess of Buchan, wishes eternal salvation in the Lord.

that I have granted, and by this my charter made firm, to God and to the church of St Andrew the apostle in Scotia and to the canons serving God in that place now and in the future, the church of Kennoway, with teinds, and oblations, and lands, and with all things rightfully belonging to the same church, just as the charter of Merleswain son of Colban and the confirmations of his heirs bear witness.
And in testimony of this matter I have confirmed the present deed with my seal.

With these witnesses: the lord German the prior, and the convent of Restenneth; Ranulf of Bunkle; Robert Mowat; Michael Mowat; Philip of Feodarg; Elias the chaplain; Adam of Theket and Adam of Rule, clerks; and others.
